evidence.snippet:
OS0
---
*   Range at 10% Target 35 m
*   Precision (up to) 0.8 cm +/-
*   Vertical Resolution (up to) 1.4°
*   Weight 500 g
](/products/hardware/os0-lidar-sensor)

products.name: OS1
products.descriptor: Mid-range 42.4° FOV digital lidar sensor, 90 m range, Blue UAS approved

evidence.snippet:
OS1
---
*   Range at 10% Target 90 m
*   Precision (up to) 0.5 cm +/-
*   Vertical Resolution (up to) 0.7°
*   Weight 482 g
](/products/hardware/os1-lidar-sensor)

*   **NDAA Compliance:** Ouster’s OS1 digital Lidar sensors are compliant with the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), as affirmed by Blue UAS approval. This is vital because, by **June 30, 2026**, the NDAA will restrict the U.S. government’s procurement and use of Lidar from certain foreign countries. Our approval ensures readiness now, well before the deadline.

products.name: VLP 16
products.descriptor: Compact mid-range 360° FOV lidar sensor, 200 m range, 16–32 channels

evidence.snippet:
VLP 16
======
Mid-range lidar sensor

With weights as low as 590g (without cabling and interfacing boxes), and a height x width of just 72 x89mm, the VLP 16 sensor is great fits for drone and UAV applications, as well as anything where size and weight are a key decision factor. Please contact us for full data sheets and configuration options.

VLS 128
=======
Long-range lidar sensor

Gemini

People, object detection and classification for actionable, intuitive, and tailorable insights in traffic, security, crowd, and retail management and analytics.

products.name: BlueCity
products.descriptor: Turnkey AI-driven lidar software for smart city traffic safety and operations

evidence.snippet:
BlueCity
========
A turnkey solution for smart cities, traffic operations, planning and safety.

Utilizing the power of digital lidar, Ouster BlueCity perception software is a turnkey and AI-enabled solution that provides real-time, on-demand traffic data to maximize efficiency and improve safety for smarter cities. Together, we can improve the efficiency of traffic infrastructure while working towards vision zero.
Detailed data for meaningful improvements.

products.name: Ouster Catalyst Edge Pro

evidence.snippet: Gemini is simple to install and requires fewer sensors than camera-based systems. With the Gemini sensor meshing tool it's easy to save time when adding new sensors.
